label: Morning Adhkar
curationNote: Seed bundles only Quran-referenced entries recited morning and evening per sahih hadith (Abu Dawud 5082, Tirmidhi 3575). Additional hadith-derived supplications (e.g. Sayyid al-Istighfar, La ilaha illa Allah wahdahu) require curation from sunnah.com (CC-BY) or a license-audited open dataset before shipping. Translations for these entries must be drawn from permissive sources, not Darussalam editions.

duas.source: Quran 112 (Al-Ikhlas) — recited 3 times morning and evening, see Abu Dawud 5082
Quran 113 (Al-Falaq) — recited 3 times morning and evening, see Abu Dawud 5082
Quran 114 (An-Nas) — recited 3 times morning and evening, see Abu Dawud 5082
